code-reviewer.description: Reviews TypeScript/React code for best practices, security, and performance

codereview.template:
Review the following code for best practices, security issues, and performance. Focus on TypeScript/React patterns.

$ARGUMENTS
codereview.description: Review code for best practices, security, and performance

test.template: Run `npm test` and analyze any failures. Focus on the failing tests and suggest fixes.
test.description: Run Vitest tests and analyze failures

lint.template: Run `npm run lint` and fix issues. Use ESLint simple-import-sort, unused-imports rules.

format.template: Run `npm run format:check` and fix formatting issues.
